name: @atlas/okf-bundle
description: Source-neutral OKF knowledge-bundle builder + the single-homed OKF wire contract. Implement the doc-source seam (enumerate pages, resolve a body); collect, cap validation, collision guard, and deterministic packing come for free. Internal-only — not published to npm (promote only after the API survives a real non-Atlas consumer). Never depends on @atlas/api, not even for tests (the round-trip test lives in @atlas/fumadocs-okf).
